requirements.task_name: Save 3 recent, highly cited cryptocurrency fraud working papers to a new reading list
requirements.task_description: Find working papers on cryptocurrency fraud published from 2021 onward with at least 50 citations, and save the 3 most recently published ones to a new reading list named 'Crypto Fraud 2024'. Success means exactly 3 papers meeting these criteria are added to that list.

requirements.task_name: Select the larger, compact credit card fraud dataset and add it to the dataset cart
requirements.task_description: Identify two credit card fraud datasets, compare them, and add to the dataset cart the one with more observations while having fewer than 50 variables. Success means exactly one dataset matching these criteria is added to the dataset cart.

requirements.task_name: Add an APA citation for a Latin America tax evasion article in a high-impact journal to a citation export list
requirements.task_description: Find an economics journal article on tax evasion in Latin America, published between 2015 and 2022, where the journal impact factor is above 3. Then save its APA citation to a citation export list named 'Tax Evasion Assignment'. Success means one citation matching all criteria is in that export list.

requirements.task_name: Create an in-site notification alert for new Ponzi scheme working papers
requirements.task_description: Set up a saved search with an in-site notification alert for Ponzi scheme working papers published from 2010 onward, scheduled to notify you weekly. Success means a saved search named 'Ponzi Schemes 2010+' is created with notification frequency set to weekly.

requirements.task_name: Follow two money laundering experts with at least 5 publications each
requirements.task_description: Find and follow two authors whose research focuses on money laundering and who each have at least 5 publications in the database. Success means exactly two such authors are added to your followed authors list.

requirements.task_name: Create a collection of 4 recent open-access financial statement fraud detection articles
requirements.task_description: Compile a collection containing 4 English-language, open-access journal articles on financial statement fraud detection, published between 2018 and 2023, each with a full-text download option. Success means a collection named 'FS Fraud Detection 2018–2023' contains exactly 4 such articles.

requirements.task_name: Bookmark a retracted LIBOR manipulation article and tag it for case study use
requirements.task_description: Identify a retracted article related to LIBOR manipulation and bookmark it with a 'case study' tag. Success means one retracted LIBOR manipulation article is bookmarked with the 'case study' tag.

requirements.task_name: Add a European financial crime conference with a registration fee under $500 to your planner
requirements.task_description: Find an upcoming conference on financial crime or fraud in Europe scheduled between September and December 2025, with a registration fee under $500, and add it to your conference planner. Success means exactly one qualifying conference is added to the planner.
